summary.en: Oman utility-scale or commercial BESS projects may reference IEC 62933 for electrical energy storage system terminology, planning, safety, performance, and environmental or installation expectations. The Oman compliance file should connect cell, module, rack, PCS, EMS, enclosure, auxiliary power, fire interface, commissioning, and maintenance evidence at system level.
summary.zh: 阿曼公用事业级或工商业BESS项目可能引用IEC 62933，覆盖电力储能系统术语、规划、安全、性能以及环境或安装要求。阿曼合规文件应在系统层面连接电芯、模组、电池架、PCS、EMS、外壳、辅助电源、消防接口、调试和维护证据。
summary.zht: 阿曼公用事業級或工商業BESS項目可能引用IEC 62933，覆蓋電力儲能系統術語、規劃、安全、性能以及環境或安裝要求。阿曼合規文件應在系統層面連接電芯、模組、電池架、PCS、EMS、外殼、輔助電源、消防接口、調試和維護證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933 series — Electrical energy storage systems
Oman project owner and utility specifications for BESS design, commissioning, and operation

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage and GB/T 36558-2023 for general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to the power grid. These are helpful but must be reconciled with IEC 62933 project clauses.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池技术标准，并采用GB/T 36558-2023作为接入电网的电化学储能系统通用技术要求。这些文件有参考价值，但须与IEC 62933项目条款协调。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池技術標準，並採用GB/T 36558-2023作為接入電網的電化學儲能系統通用技術要求。這些文件有參考價值，但須與IEC 62933項目條款協調。

gap.en: A cell or battery report does not prove system-level BESS compliance. Exporters should provide a complete system dossier including single-line diagrams, PCS settings, EMS functions, enclosure ratings, thermal management, fire interface, installation conditions, commissioning tests, and operating manuals.
gap.zh: 电芯或电池报告不能证明系统级BESS合规。出口商应提供完整系统资料包，包括单线图、PCS设定、EMS功能、外壳等级、热管理、消防接口、安装条件、调试测试和运行手册。
gap.zht: 電芯或電池報告不能證明系統級BESS合規。出口商應提供完整系統資料包，包括單線圖、PCS設定、EMS功能、外殼等級、熱管理、消防接口、安裝條件、調試測試和運行手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific where IEC 62933 is adopted by tender, owner, utility, insurer, or DGSM-related specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese grid-connection and project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62933 review is system-level. Oman project files should connect battery, PCS, EMS, fire, grid, commissioning, and operating evidence rather than relying only on cell-level GB reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62933审查属于系统层面。阿曼项目文件应连接电池、PCS、EMS、消防、并网、调试和运行证据，而不是只依赖电芯级GB报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62933審查屬於系統層面。阿曼項目文件應連接電池、PCS、EMS、消防、併網、調試和運行證據，而不是只依賴電芯級GB報告。
